data.title: Intel stock increased 6% as it seeks investment from Apple; both exploring deeper collaboration, preliminary talks ongoing.
data.description: Intel Corp's stock (INTC) saw a surge on Wednesday after news emerged about the company approaching Apple, Inc. (AAPL) for a potential investment. The stock of INTC rose following the report. The companies have also been in talks to enhance their partnership, although these discussions are in the early stages and may not lead to a formal agreement, as per Reuters. While Intel and Apple have not provided any official statements on the subject, Intel's shares jumped by 6% after the news broke out. For more in-depth coverage, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dream Residential REIT is sending circular for special meeting with unitholders to approve acquisition by Morgan Properties. TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN.
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN) disclosed sending out its Management Information Circular for the upcoming special meeting of unitholders to approve the proposed transaction with Morgan Properties. The Circular and associated documents have been mailed to Unitholders. The Meeting will involve unitholders of the REIT and Class B unitholders of DRR Holdings LLC. Key numbers: TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN, Morgan Properties.
Chinese delegation to visit US Treasury for trade, economy talks - Fox Business reporter on X

data.title: AGS unveils new brand at G2E 2025, biggest showcase in company history: 86 slots, 8 table games, AGSi zone.
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 24, 2025, AGS is set to make a big impact at the upcoming Global Gaming Expo (G2E) in October. They will unveil a fresh brand identity and present their biggest product display yet at booth #1150. AGS will feature a total of 86 slot games, along with eight table games that include various progressive jackpots, side bets, and card shufflers. Additionally, they will introduce a new zone for AGSi, their Interactive division, at the event.

data.title: Jeff Swickard acquired BMW Portland from Lithia Motors, cementing his commitment to the city amid challenges.
data.description: Yesterday, CEO Jeff Swickard of Swickard Auto Group acquired BMW Portland from Lithia Motors in Portland, Ore. The deal comprises the valuable franchise and its real estate, showcasing Swickard's dedication to the city amidst other departures. "This acquisition is a significant personal and professional commitment to Portland," stated Swickard. "Having been a part of my life for many years, this is my contribution to its future." With this purchase, Swickard further solidifies his ties to the city.

data.title: Orbit Garant reports highest net earnings in over 10 years for fiscal 2025, with revenue of $189.1M and gross profit of $28.3M. CEO credits strong growth to focus on Canada and South America operations, plans to pay down debt and expand operations. Q4 revenue up to $47.2 million, with $33.8M from Canada and $13.4M from international operations. Gross profit for Q4 was $7.6 million, with adjusted EBITDA at $5.5 million. Net earnings for Q4 were $2.2 million.
data.description: Orbit Garant Drilling Inc. announced its financial results for Q4 2025 and fiscal year ended June 30, 2025. Revenue for Q4 2025 was $47.2 million, a 3.9% increase from Q4 2024. Gross profit was $7.6 million, with a gross margin of 16%. Adjusted EBITDA was $5.5 million. Net earnings for Q4 2025 were $2.2 million, with earnings per share of $0.06. Throughout the year, the company experienced strong growth in earnings driven by improved profitability in Canada and South America. Orbit Garant plans to focus on senior and well-financed customers, operational improvement, and debt reduction to drive further shareholder value. The company remains confident due to high gold and copper prices, promising to stay disciplined in their business strategy and expansion efforts.

data.title: e.l.f. Cosmetics partners with Tottenham Hotspur, with the Women's team facing Aston Villa and Men's team against Doncaster.
data.description: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Beauty's brand, e.l.f. Cosmetics, is significantly enhancing its collaboration with the Tottenham Hotspur Football Club for the Carabao Cup tournament. The Women's team of Tottenham Hotspur will compete against Aston Villa at 7:00 PM BST, while the Men's team will play against Doncaster in the Carabao Cup at 7:45 PM BST. Notably, both teams will proudly display the e.l.f. name on their uniforms, marking a significant moment for the brand's partnership.

data.title: Range Impact raised $550,000 in capital to acquire and repurpose mine sites in Appalachia.
data.description: In Cleveland, Ohio, on September 24, 2025, Range Impact, Inc. (OTCQB: RNGE), a public impact investing firm focused on acquiring and repurposing mine sites in Appalachia, declared the completion of a $550,000 capital raise.

data.title: Richmond American Homes of Arizona announces Grand Opening of Portfolio at Lucero community in Goodyear, Arizona on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: The Portfolio at Lucero offers a selection of new homes in a highly desirable location in Goodyear, Arizona. On September 24, 2025, Richmond American Homes of Arizona, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., officially opened this development. The grand opening marked the introduction of an exceptional array of homes to the market.

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Corp. acquired uranium claims in Utah, US, entering definitive agreements to obtain 100% interests in Wheel Anne and Green Vein Mesa Claims in Emery County.
data.description: In Vancouver B.C. on September 24, 2025, Terra Clean Energy Corp. ("Terra" or the "Company") has confirmed the acquisition of a 100% interest in the Wheel Anne Claims and the Green Vein Mesa Claims, situated in Emery County, Utah, United States. This announcement follows a press release from September 16, 2025. The agreements were made with independent parties, as revealed in the recent press release, to solidify the acquisition. The Company's stock is identified on the Canadian Securities Exchange as TCEC, on the OTCQB as TCEFF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as C 9O0.

data.title: Solsten secures growth-funding agreement with Decathlon Capital Partners for expansion and enhancement of Elaris, the world's first psychological AI platform.
data.description: Solsten Inc. has recently secured a transaction that is favorable to the company, enabling it to receive funds for expansion and the improvement of its services. This will also lead to the acceleration of Elaris, the pioneering psychological AI platform globally. The transaction was finalized in Minneapolis on September 24, 2025. Solsten Inc. is set to redefine how businesses interpret data through its artificial-intelligence services. The company's focus on innovation and growth is evident in their latest move, showcasing their commitment to advancing their technological capabilities.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Indexes down, Astera Labs and other stocks skid. Stay cautious amid market changes.
data.description: On Wednesday, market indexes experienced slight declines as notable companies like Astera Labs and Credo Technology thrived during the autumn. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures remained steady. As many popular stocks experienced a downturn, investors may be considering their next steps during this period of market fluctuation.

data.title: Flow Capital Corp. announced changing auditors from DMCL to PwC on Sept. 24, 2025. (numbers: 2 auditing firms, date)
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Flow Capital Corp. (TSXV:FW), a prominent provider of flexible growth capital and alternative debt solutions, disclosed the transition of its auditor from Dale Matheson Carl-Hilton Labonte LLP (DMCL) to PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP (PwC). This change took effect on the mentioned date.

data.title: Dow falls on inflation concerns; Micron stock drops after earnings. Oracle, OpenAI collaborate on Stargate Plan.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following the release of new home sales data. Micron, an AI stock, also saw a drop in its value after posting earnings. The stock market today showcased the Dow sliding prior to the release of inflation data. Additionally, tech giants Oracle and OpenAI announced advancements in their collaborative project, the Stargate plan. This event was covered live in the financial news.

data.title: Marketable tantalite concentrates achieved from CV5 deposit at Shaakichiuwaanaan, Sydney. Potential co-product with lithium production.
data.description: Test results are indicating progress towards potential future production of valuable tantalite as a byproduct or co-product alongside lithium in Montreal. The bench-scale testwork conducted in Sydney, Australia on September 24, 2025, has successfully yielded marketable tantalite concentrate from the CV5 material. This development signifies a promising advancement in diversifying production and tapping into the growing market demand for tantalite.

data.title: Dr. Michelle L. Costa named 2025 Pinnacle Professional Member by The Inner Circle for Long-Term Care Leadership.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Westport, Massachusetts, Dr. Michelle L. Costa was recognized as a 2025 Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her role as Chief Clinical Officer in elevating Long-Term Care Leadership. Dr. Costa is prominently featured in The Inner Circle for her achievements in this field.

data.title: NRG Energy, Inc. has priced $1.25 billion senior secured first lien notes due 2030 and 2035, along with senior unsecured notes.
data.description: Houston-based NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) has successfully priced its concurrent offerings of senior secured first lien notes totaling $1.25 billion, with the Secured Notes Offering including $625 million of 4.734% senior secured first lien notes due 2030 and $625 million of 5.407% senior secured first lien notes due 2035. In addition, the company also announced a separate offering of senior unsecured notes.
